mapper.update: update nursing_level_item_mapping set del_flag = '1' where nursing_item_id = #{itemId} and del_flag = '0'
update nursing_level_item_mapping set del_flag = '1' where nursing_level_id = #{levelId} and del_flag = '0'
update nursing_level_item_mapping set del_flag = '1' where nursing_item_id = #{id} and del_flag = '0'
